name: Eggless French Toast
tagline: Cinnamon-soaked thick-cut bread, fried golden — no eggs in the custard

hero.alt: Stack of golden French toast with maple syrup pour
hero.caption: eggless french toast — golden, cinnamon-spiked

steps.title: Whisk the custard
steps.detail: Whisk milk, cornstarch, sugar, cinnamon, vanilla, salt until cornstarch dissolves completely.
steps.tip: Strain if you see lumps — cornstarch curdles on a hot griddle.

steps.title: Soak briefly
steps.detail: Dip bread for 8–10 seconds per side — long enough to coat, not soak through.
steps.tip: Stale bread absorbs more cleanly than fresh; toast slices first if your bread is too soft.

steps.title: Sizzle in butter
steps.detail: Heat butter in a non-stick skillet over medium. Cook bread 2–3 minutes per side until golden.
steps.tip: Wipe the pan between batches — butter solids burn after the first round.

steps.title: Serve hot
steps.detail: Stack and serve immediately with maple syrup, fresh berries, or a dusting of powdered sugar.
steps.tip: Holding warm in a 200°F oven on a rack keeps slices crisp without sweating.

healthFacts: No eggs — milk thickened with cornstarch coats and crisps just as well.
Day-old bread absorbs more without falling apart — perfect texture.
Cinnamon spike helps blunt blood-sugar swings from the bread.
